data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Implement robust DDoS mitigation strategies to protect against traffic flooding attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilize redundant network architectures and specialized DDoS protection services like Cloudflare or AWS Shield.

data.title: Data Encryption and Integrity
data.description: Ensure all data, both in transit and at rest, is encrypted to maintain user privacy and data integrity.
data.technical_spec: Implement TLS for data in transit and use AES-256 for data at rest encryption.

data.title: User Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Strengthen user identity verification to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Integrate OAuth2 and multi-factor authentication (MFA) mechanisms.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conduct regular security audits and penetration testing to identify and patch vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engage third-party security agencies for comprehensive penetration tests and audits.

data.title: Content Moderation Systems
data.description: Enhance content moderation to prevent harmful and illegal content dissemination.
data.technical_spec: Leverage machine learning algorithms for automated moderation with human oversight.
